title: Senior Teacher - Adda247 - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Adda247 - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Adda247 invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Adda247:
Adda247 is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247!
